kept.text:
Claude يجهز مساعده الاستباقي الجديد Orbit

يبدو أن Anthropic تعمل على ميزة جديدة داخل Claude Cowork باسم Orbit، وهي مساعد استباقي يعطيك تنبيهات ورؤى مخصصة قبل ما تطلبها.

الفكرة أن Orbit يقدر يجمع إشارات من Gmail وSlack وGitHub وCalendar وDrive وFigma وغيرها، ثم يحولها إلى ملخصات أو اقتراحات ذكية بشكل تلقائي.

أهم النقاط:
• رؤى شخصية من تطبيقاتك المختلفة
• مساعد يعمل بشكل استباقي
• إمكانية نشر تطبيقات Orbit خاصة بك
• منافسة مباشرة لـ ChatGPT Pulse
• غالبًا قد تكون حصرية لاشتراك Max

kept.text:
It’s live! 🎉

For the past two weeks the only reason I have left my house was to go the gym 

And that is because I’ve been building something 

This year I promised myself I was going to learn how to use AI properly 

I paid for an Ai Automation class in January which I fumbled badly because I had two clients at the time and I was posting on 5 platforms with no support. 

Two months ago, I started learning AI assisted engineering as a designer who has never written a code a day in her life. 

And today my first application is live….built in Claude code and cursor  from scratch 

Designed in figma 

Tested it out with 10 people and this was what they had to say!! 

I can’t wait to share it with you tomorrow 🎉🤝

kept.text:
ChatGPT accidentally created a huge problem.

People stopped learning software.

Now they just copy prompts…
watch tutorials…
and pray it works.

This startup may have just killed that behavior.

It’s called Spotit.
Found it here:
https://t.co/db1Ez1eM8L

And it’s one of the smartest AI products I’ve seen this year.

Instead of giving you a giant wall of instructions…

It watches your screen and points to the EXACT button you need inside the app.

In real time.

You press a shortcut on Mac and ask:

“How do I crop in Figma?”
“How do I remove background in Photoshop?”
“How do I create transitions in Premiere Pro?”

And it guides you step-by-step directly inside the software.

No YouTube tabs.
No searching menus.
No “wait where is that option?”

The genius part is:

It DOESN’T take control.

You still do every click yourself.

Which means your brain actually learns the workflow naturally.

That’s a way bigger idea than most people realize.

Because the next billion AI users won’t be coders.

They’ll be normal people trying to learn:
• Design
• Editing
• Excel
• AI tools
• Productivity software

And whoever makes software feel “learnable” with AI…

wins.

This honestly feels like the beginning of:
“AI-native education.”

Normal tutorials already feel outdated after using this.

profile_bio.description: Sharing Latest AI Tools, Resources & Tech News  | 💌 Collabs: kshitijmishra27@gmail.com |  Free Coding, AI & Dev Tools to Learn
